channel.title: NeurIPS-2021 on Sukai Huang
channel.description: Recent content in NeurIPS-2021 on Sukai Huang

item.title: Iglu Neurips 2021 Workshop
item.description: [TOC] IGLU Minecraft challenge NeurIPS 2021 workshop https://nips.cc/virtual/2021/competition/22444 The organiser introduced a Web environment for data collection CraftAssist and VoxelWorld.js Architect task Baseline model Ha! No winner that outperforms the baseline?! …. which means I have a chance ! Builder task the organiser found out that the reward function would motivate the agent to break blocks Their Future direction Breakout session Winner Solution https://github.

item.title: Interesting Tutorial Slides in Neurips 2021
item.description: [TOC] Interesting Tutorial Slides in NeurIPS 2021 I am going to gather interesting Slides from each Workshops I watched DeepMind NeuroSymbolic AI The Art of Gaussian Process Self supervised learning Emergent Communication Attention over learned object embeddings enables complex visual reasoning read the paper ! https://github.com/deepmind/deepmind-research/tree/master/object_attention_for_reasoning
